description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce featuring a central cylindrical gold fixture from which six elegantly curved metallic arms extend outward, each ending in a candle-like light bulb. The arms are symmetrically arranged, creating a balanced and classic appearance. The fixture is suspended from a decorative gold chain, adding to its vintage charm. The base of each arm is adorned with a small, round gold plate that supports the faux candle bulbs. The materials appear to be a combination of polished metal, likely brass or gold-plated, and glass or plastic for the bulbs. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional European chandeliers, suitable for upscale urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: A gold and silver chandelier-style sconce with six curved arms, each holding a candle-like bulb, suspended by a decorative chain. The design is ornate and vintage, with polished metallic finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms and bulbs symmetrically arranged around the central gold fixture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the depth of the central fixture, with three bulbs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the full spread of the arms and bulbs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, showing the arm curvature and three bulbs from the other side.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, classical chandelier design with ornate metallic arms and a decorative chain, evoking traditional European elegance.
